description: Mock application packet: a UAE citizen family member (Fadl Nayef Al Marzooqi) whose Emirates ID card was lost, selected from the applicant's family book and replaced via the ICP Smart App's 'Replace Emirates ID' service, with delivery to a specific Abu Dhabi address. All values are fabricated illustrative data (not a real Unified Number, passport, or address), constructed to match the shape of the manual's own worked example: preferredLanguage='ARABIC', applicantClass fixed to 'UAE Citizen' (the citizen pathway), deliveryMethod='Deliver to specific address' (exercising the deliveryCompany/deliveryEmirate follow-on fields), and termsAndConditionsAccepted=true (the required eligibility gate).
